scripts.build: npm run build -w @propdfmate/web && npm run build -w @propdfmate/api && npm run build -w @propdfmate/worker
scripts.start:all: npm run start -w @propdfmate/api & npm run start -w @propdfmate/worker & npm run start -w @propdfmate/web
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @propdfmate/api & npm run dev -w @propdfmate/worker & npm run dev -w @propdfmate/web
